seoTitle: Pebbly Beach vs Peel — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pebbly Beach and Peel. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pebbly Beach vs Peel: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pebbly Beach and Peel.
heading: Pebbly Beach vs Peel — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pebbly Beach, New South Wales and Peel, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Peel has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Pebbly Beach (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pebbly Beach or Peel safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pebbly Beach has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Peel scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pebbly Beach scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Peel scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pebbly Beach or Peel?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Peel has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.23% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
